title: arrhenatherum neumayerianum
intro: Arrhenatherum neumayerianum, also known as Mountain Melick, is a perennial plant species belonging to the grass family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum neumayerianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs, and soothe digestive issues, while also exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to alleviate respiratory and gastrointestinal complaints.
